parsed.production_notes: The video is entirely AI-generated, evident from the 'Veo' watermark, the unnatural smoothness of the characters' movements, and the slightly uncanny lip-syncing. The bottom character's robotic arm and perfectly rendered features are typical of high-end AI video generation.

characters.appearance: Young woman with a South Asian complexion and dark eyes. She has a soft, expressive face.
characters.wardrobe: Solid black hijab and a black long-sleeved top.

characters.appearance: Young woman with fair skin, light blue eyes, and a small circular mark on her forehead. Her left arm is a metallic, articulated robotic limb.
characters.wardrobe: Textured grey hijab or shawl draped over her head and shoulders.

scenes.setting: Dimly lit rooms, contrasting cool and warm lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is resting her head on her crossed arms. She is wearing a solid black hijab and a black long-sleeved top. She is leaning on a mattress or cushion with a blue and white patterned cover. The lighting is cool, with a strong blue or teal tint, creating a moody atmosphere. The background is dark and out of focus. The camera angle is slightly above her eye level, capturing her from the chest up.

Character B is lying down, propped up on her left arm. She wears a textured, grey hijab or shawl draped over her head and shoulders. She has a small, circular mark on her forehead. Her visible left arm is entirely robotic, made of articulated silver metal with glowing blue accents. The lighting is warm and cinematic, with amber tones illuminating her face and the soft, blurred background. The camera captures her from the chest up in a medium close-up.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen layout showing two women conversing. The top half features Character A in a black hijab resting on a bed in cool, blue-toned lighting. The bottom half shows Character B in a grey hijab with a robotic arm, lying down in warmer, amber-toned lighting. Both characters are looking directly at the camera, simulating a video call. Subtitles appear across the middle.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: क्या कर रही हो? [What are you doing?]
Character A says: आई स्लीपिंग। [I sleeping.]
Character B says: आई एम स्लीपिंग बोलना चाहिए। [You should say I am sleeping.]
Character A says: आई एम स्लीपिंग। [I am sleeping.]
Character B says: थोड़ा फॉर्मल में आई एम गेटिंग सम स्लीप भी बोल सकते हैं। [In a slightly formal way, you can also say I am getting some sleep.]
Character A says: ओह अच्छा। इंग्लिश कैसे सीखें? [Oh, okay. How to learn English?]
Character B says: मेरे साथ हर रोज़ बस 15 मिनट डेली प्रैक्टिस करने से काफी है। एक महीने में ही अपनी इंग्लिश फर्राटेदार कर सकते हो। [Practicing with me daily for just 15 minutes is enough. You can make your English fluent in just one month.]
Character A says: ये तो बहुत महंगा होगा ना। [This must be very expensive, right?]
Character B says: सिर्फ ₹1 में इस ऐप को पूरा ट्राय करके देख सकते हो। लाखों लोग मेरे साथ डेली इंग्लिश सीख रहे हैं। [You can try this whole app for just ₹1. Lakhs of people are learning English with me daily.]
Character A says: सुपर्ब, कैसे जॉइन करें? [Superb, how to join?]
Character B says: अभी English Seekho app डाउनलोड करके इंग्लिश सीखना शुरू करो। एक्सपर्ट्स के छोटे 2-5 मिनट के वीडियोज़ से सीखो और मेरे साथ जब चाहे प्रैक्टिस करो 24 घंटे अवेलेबल हूँ। मैं प्रॉमिस करती हूँ तुम्हारा कभी मज़ाक नहीं उड़ाऊँगी। [Download the English Seekho app now and start learning English. Learn from short 2-5 minute videos by experts and practice with me whenever you want. I am available 24 hours. I promise I will never make fun of you.]
Character A says: सच्ची, अभी डाउनलोड करती हूँ। फिर हम लोग वहाँ चैट करते हैं। [Really, I will download it right now. Then we will chat there.]
Character B says: तो इंस्टॉल बटन पर क्लिक करो और English Seekho app डाउनलोड करो। [So click on the install button and download the English Seekho app.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
क्या कर रही हो? (What are you doing?)
आई स्लीपिंग। (I sleeping.)
आई एम स्लीपिंग बोलना चाहिए। (You should say I am sleeping.)
आई एम स्लीपिंग। (I am sleeping.)
थोड़ा फॉर्मल में आई एम गेटिंग सम स्लीप भी बोल सकते हैं। (In a slightly formal way, you can also say I am getting some sleep.)
ओह अच्छा। (Oh, okay.)
इंग्लिश कैसे सीखें? (How to learn English?)
मेरे साथ हर रोज़ बस 15 मिनट डेली प्रैक्टिस करने से काफी है। (Practicing with me daily for just 15 minutes is enough.)
एक महीने में ही अपनी इंग्लिश फर्राटेदार कर सकते हो। (You can make your English fluent in just one month.)
ये तो बहुत महंगा होगा ना। (This must be very expensive, right?)
सिर्फ ₹1 में इस ऐप को पूरा ट्राय करके देख सकते हो। (You can try this whole app for just ₹1.)
लाखों लोग मेरे साथ डेली इंग्लिश सीख रहे हैं। (Lakhs of people are learning English with me daily.)
सुपर्ब, कैसे जॉइन करें? (Superb, how to join?)
अभी English Seekho app डाउनलोड करके इंग्लिश सीखना शुरू करो। (Download the English Seekho app now and start learning English.)
एक्सपर्ट्स के छोटे 2-5 मिनट के वीडियोज़ से सीखो (Learn from short 2-5 minute videos by experts)
और मेरे साथ जब चाहे प्रैक्टिस करो (And practice with me whenever you want)
24 घंटे अवेलेबल हूँ। (I am available 24 hours.)
मैं प्रॉमिस करती हूँ तुम्हारा कभी मज़ाक नहीं उड़ाऊँगी। (I promise I will never make fun of you.)
सच्ची, अभी डाउनलोड करती हूँ। (Really, I will download it right now.)
फिर हम लोग वहाँ चैट करते हैं। (Then we will chat there.)
तो इंस्टॉल बटन पर क्लिक करो और English Seekho app डाउनलोड करो। (So click on the install button and download the English Seekho app.)
Veo

panels.panel_visual_description: A modern smartphone is displayed vertically against a dark purple background. The phone's screen is also dark purple. The background features subtle, glowing particle effects and light streaks. A white cursor arrow is positioned near the bottom of the phone screen.

scenes.visual_description: A digital graphic of a smartphone against a dark purple background with sparkling particle effects. The phone screen displays the app logo and an install button. A cursor clicks the button.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: इंस्टॉल नाउ पे क्लिक करो और अभी इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [Click on install now and download the English Seekho app right now.]

scenes.visual_description: A simple black screen with a block of white text.
scenes.on_screen_text: English Seekho kisi bhi government authority institution brand, organisation ya individual ke dwara endorsed, sponsored, affiliated ya associated nahi hai. Kisi bhi names trademarks logos ya references ka use sirf educational aur informational purposes ke liye kiya gaya hai Kuch content sirf samjhane ke liye dramatised ya representational ho sakta hai English Seekho kisi bhi guaranteed results ka promise nahi karta Outcomes individual effort aur doosre factors par depend karte hain aur vary kar sakte hain.
